primary_insights: OpenAI GPT-4 shows 94% accuracy in diagnostic assistance
Google's Med-PaLM 2 specifically designed for healthcare applications
Regulatory compliance requires explainable AI approaches
Microservices architecture best for AI service integration
Edge computing reduces latency for real-time diagnostic assistance
API gateway needed for rate limiting and security
Integration complexity estimated at 6-8 weeks development time
Existing medical records API can be extended for AI integration
Streaming responses essential for user experience
Comprehensive testing required for medical accuracy validation
Security testing critical for patient data protection
Performance testing needed for diagnostic response times

consensus_decision.selected_approach: Hybrid AI Integration with Google Med-PaLM 2 and OpenAI GPT-4

phase_1.name: Foundation and Integration
scope: Integrate Google Med-PaLM 2 for primary diagnostic assistance
Implement secure API gateway with healthcare compliance
Develop initial UI components for diagnostic interface

phase_2.name: Enhancement and Validation
scope: Add OpenAI GPT-4 for explanatory and educational content
Implement comprehensive testing and validation framework
Add audit logging and explainability features

phase_3.name: Optimization and Deployment
scope: Final security auditing and compliance validation
Gradual rollout with monitoring and feedback collection

primary_reasoning: Google Med-PaLM 2 provides healthcare-specific training and higher medical accuracy
Hybrid approach leverages strengths of both AI models for comprehensive assistance
Phased implementation reduces risk while enabling quick value delivery
Architecture supports future AI model integration and scaling

chosen_benefits: Higher diagnostic accuracy with healthcare-specific AI
accepted_trade_offs: Higher implementation complexity than single-model approach
Increased operational costs with two AI services
Longer development timeline for full feature set

risk_mitigation.mitigation: Comprehensive validation testing with medical professionals
risk_mitigation.monitoring: Continuous accuracy monitoring and feedback loops

risk_mitigation.mitigation: End-to-end encryption and security audit protocols
risk_mitigation.monitoring: Real-time security monitoring and compliance reporting

minority_opinions.rationale: Simpler implementation with single OpenAI GPT-4 integration
minority_opinions.preserved_reasoning: Lower complexity and faster time-to-market, though with potentially lower medical accuracy

immediate_next_steps: Conduct technical proof of concept with Google Med-PaLM 2
Design secure API architecture for AI service integration
Begin healthcare compliance and regulatory review process
success_criteria: Diagnostic accuracy validation ≥95% against medical professional baseline
System performance maintains <200ms response time for 95th percentile
Healthcare compliance audit passed with zero critical findings
Healthcare professional adoption rate ≥80% within 3 months
monitoring_and_evaluation: Weekly performance and accuracy metrics review
Continuous system performance and reliability monitoring

patterns_extracted: Hybrid AI integration strategy for healthcare applications
Phased implementation approach for complex AI features
Consensus building with weighted expert contributions
future_applications: Similar AI integrations in other healthcare domains
Complex technical decision making with multiple stakeholder perspectives
Risk-balanced implementation strategies for mission-critical features
